name: Ronaldo Bows Out as the Last Eight Takes Shape
angle: The round of 16 closes with a giant taking his leave: Mikel Merino's stoppage-time strike sends Spain past Portugal and, in all likelihood, ends Cristiano Ronaldo's international career, while Belgium put four past co-hosts the United States to complete the picture of the last eight.

questions.question: Which nation knocked Portugal out of the 2026 World Cup in the round of 16?
Cristiano Ronaldo's international career looks to have ended at the 2026 World Cup, playing for which country?
Belgium ended which co-hosts' World Cup run with a heavy round-of-16 win?
Who scored the stoppage-time winner as Spain beat Portugal 1-0?
In which minute did Spain's winning goal against Portugal arrive?
Beating Portugal gave Spain their first World Cup knockout win since which year, when they lifted the trophy?
By what scoreline did Belgium beat the United States in the round of 16?
Which Belgium forward scored twice in the win over the United States?
Spain's victory over Portugal set up a quarter-final against which side?
France reached the last eight with a 1-0 win over Paraguay, the goal a penalty from whom?
Ronaldo made history at the 2026 World Cup as the first player to score at how many different World Cup tournaments?
Who scored the United States' lone goal in their 4-1 defeat to Belgium?
Morocco set up the France quarter-final by beating Canada 3-0, with a brace from which midfielder?
Spain's win over Portugal was their first World Cup knockout victory since the 2010 final. Who did they beat to win that tournament?
Ronaldo's group-stage goal against Uzbekistan made him, at 41, the second-oldest scorer in World Cup history. Who remains the oldest?

sources: https://www.cnn.com/2026/07/06/sport/world-cup-round-of-16-monday (Spain 1-0 Portugal: Mikel Merino 91st-minute winner ends Ronaldo's tournament and likely his international career; Spain advance to face winner of USA v Belgium)

https://www.espn.com/espn/story/_/id/49291130/2026-fifa-world-cup-recap-july-6-cristiano-ronaldo-portugal-exit-late-spain-winner-belgium-end-usa-hopes (Merino 91' low drive assisted by Ferran Torres; Belgium 4-1 USA — De Ketelaere 9' and 33', Vanaken 57', Lukaku 90+3', Malik Tillman 31' for USA; sets up Spain v Belgium quarter-final)
https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49290017/cristiano-ronaldo-portugal-spain-last-world-cup-2026 (Ronaldo, 41, exits his sixth and final World Cup in tears)

https://www.cbssports.com/soccer/news/portugal-spain-live-updates-world-cup-2026-score-result/live/ (Spain eliminate Portugal on late goal; first knockout win since the 2010 final; face winner of USMNT v Belgium)

https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/cristiano-ronaldo-portugal-goal-record (Ronaldo becomes first player to score at six different World Cups — 2006, 2010, 2014, 2018, 2022, 2026 — netting twice v Uzbekistan; at 41y138d, second-oldest scorer in World Cup history behind Roger Milla, 42y39d)

https://www.aljazeera.com/sports/2026/7/6/which-teams-are-in-the-world-cup-quarterfinals-and-whats-the-schedule (Confirmed quarter-finalists Morocco, France, Norway, England, Spain, Belgium; France v Morocco July 9 Boston, Belgium v Spain July 10 Los Angeles, Norway v England July 11 Miami)

https://www.espn.com/espn/story/_/id/49271700/2026-fifa-world-cup-recap-france-paraguay-morocco-canada-kylian-mbappe (France 1-0 Paraguay — Mbappe 69' penalty after Desire Doue was fouled; Morocco 3-0 Canada — Azzedine Ounahi 50' and 82', Soufiane Rahimi late)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2010_FIFA_World_Cup_Final (Spain 1-0 Netherlands, Andres Iniesta winner, Spain's only World Cup title)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Roger_Milla (Cameroon; oldest goalscorer in World Cup history at 42 years 39 days, 1994 v Russia)
